subject: Stefania ut, Budapest, 2018. Trolleybus line 75 (Skoda-Solaris) at the intersection of Ajtosi Durer sor and Stefania ut, Zuglo district.
context_for_lesson: A 2018 photograph of Stefania ut in Budapest's Zuglo district, the same street where Judy Abrams's family lived before going into hiding in 1944. Pairs naturally with the 1943 Fortepan photograph of Stefania ut 107 to form a Then-and-Now image-comparison slider. Same street, 75 years apart.
author: Globetrotter19

attribution_required: Photo: Globetrotter19 via Wikimedia Commons (CC BY-SA 3.0)
lesson_use_intent: Use as the 'now' frame in a Then-and-Now image-comparison slider for the Budapest waypoint, paired with the 1943 Fortepan photograph budapest-stefania-ut-1943-fortepan.jpg as the 'then' frame.
